description: Style NoteA formal essential, the belt is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. peter england perfects this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes by combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Wear this piece with formal trousers, formal shoes in a matching hue, and crisp full-sleeved shirts.Product DetailsBlack belt with tang clasp for a snug FitHoles to customise fitFixed loop near the buckle to hold belt in placeMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dustDo not store in sunlight
